headline: eBay Inc. announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025.
investor_impact: The release of Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings is a primary catalyst for the stock, providing critical updates on gross merchandise volume (GMV), revenue, and profitability. Analysts will need to review the attached Exhibit 99.1 press release to update valuation models and assess the company's fundamental trajectory.
